properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're all gathered here, In Your presence Lord, With our arms open wide, With lifted hands and with open hearts, We welcome You to abide.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord we need Your Spirit, Your Holy Spirit, right now, Oh Lord give us Your Spirit, Your Holy Spirit, right now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We can do nothing, Until You come, dear Lord, For we are so unworthy, To even call on Your name, So please please, please, please, Please Lord hear our prayer, And don't let our coming be in vain.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Spirit, Spirit fall fresh on me, Spirit, Spirit fall fresh on me, Fall down (fall down), Fall down (fall down), Fall fresh on me, Fall down (fall down), Fall down (fall down), fall fresh on me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy spirit, Holy Spirit I need you to abide in me In everything that I do, Everything I say Lord I need you in my home And even when I'm riding down The dangerous highways I need You, I need You.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: To fall down (fall down), fall down (fall down), Fall fresh on me Fall down (fall down), fall down (fall down), Fall fresh on me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Spirit Spirit fall fresh on me, Spirit Spirit fall fresh on me, Spirit Spirit fall fresh on me.
